creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Muhammad Moinur Rahman (bofh@FreeBSD.org) has committed an alternative:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=5f6a91b20b0cc19367288d4b73cf7434850fb39c

tho, I think actually fixing arguments at the function call site is a better solution instead of tuning the compiler.
